recommendations.title: Ninja III: The Domination
recommendations.overview: An aerobics instructor becomes a ruthless assassin after being possessed by a slain ninja's spirit, leading to a showdown with a martial arts expert.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Ninja
recommendations.overview: A peaceful ex-ninja's life shatters when his son's kidnapping forces him back into violence amid an American-Japanese criminal drug war.

recommendations.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
recommendations.overview: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong investigates the disappearance of several marines, which leads him to The Lion, a super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

recommendations.title: Stalingrad
recommendations.overview: A German Platoon is explored through the brutal fighting of the Battle of Stalingrad. After half of their number is wiped out and they're placed under the command of a sadistic captain, the platoon lieutenant leads his men to desert. The platoon memb

recommendations.title: The Manchurian Candidate
recommendations.overview: Near the end of the Korean War, a platoon of U.S. soldiers is captured by communists and brainwashed. Following the war, the platoon is returned home, and Sergeant Raymond Shaw is lauded as a hero by the rest of his platoon. However, the platoon comm

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: R-Point
recommendations.overview: On 07 January 1972, the South Korean base in Nha-Trang, Vietnam, receives a radio transmission from a missing platoon presumed dead.

recommendations.title: A Prophet
recommendations.overview: Sentenced to six years in prison, Malik El Djebena is alone in the world and can neither read nor write. On his arrival at the prison, he seems younger and more brittle than the others detained there. At once he falls under the sway of a group of Cor

recommendations.title: Greyhound
recommendations.overview: A first-time captain leads a convoy of allied ships carrying thousands of soldiers across the treacherous waters of the "Black Pit" to the front lines of WWII. With no air cover protection for 5 days, the captain and his convoy must battle the surrou

recommendations.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
recommendations.overview: The two American Ninjas, Joe Armstrong and Sean Davidson, team up to do battle against a terrorist and his band of Ninjas.
